programmes.show_description: Non-stop 70s rock & guitar action - all night!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1979!
1979 was another top year in music, with pop, disco & new wave rubbing shoulders with rock, synth & 2-Tone. Simon Bates has the story - month by month.
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1979!
In order - 12 videos that hit the top of the US chart in 1979. Some are obvious, but there are a few surprises along the way! Herb Alpert anyone?
10 artists that had a single big song in 1979 - then never darkened the UK Top 20 ever again! Remember The Flying Lizards, Quantum Leap or Fiddler's Dram?
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1979!
Tracks with big TV connections! Could be theme tunes, adverts or just a song made famous by a TV show.
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Remember when rock was WILD? From '64 to '74 the pioneering heroes presented by a man who was at the centre of it all - from The Kinks to The Beatles to Black Sabbath to Queen!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Simon Bates with the ultimate countdown of 70s love songs. 100 songs with heartfelt vocals, lush strings & big breakdowns in an 8 hour marathon! Expect Chicago, Eric Carmen & 10cc.

programmes.show_name: I'm Stone In Love With You!
programmes.show_description: Crackling vinyl, shag carpets & lava lamp glows - this is how we loved in the 70s! Oh James...
The voice of your childhood Derek Griffiths with 40 of those tunes you pestered your parents to buy - all top pop moments that still bring a smile & happy memories of school days!

programmes.show_name: Help Me Make It Through the Night!
programmes.show_description: Non-stop love songs, back to back all night, from the era of Leo Sayer, Carpenters, The Bee Gees & Minnie Ripperton.
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1976!
Another 60 minutes of heatwave hits & headlines from a year of contrasts - Punk, Dancing Queen, the Inter-City 125, the Honey Monster & that year's top toy - Swingball!
A complete rundown of the 30 biggest selling UK singles UK for 1976 - can you believe these were all hits 50 years ago? And if you thought Abba were at number 1 - think again!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1976!
Another batch of silly songs, dodgy videos & novelty hits from the 70s. Yes every one of these was a huge hit!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Mark Goodier's seven-hour marathon run-through of some of the biggest number 1 videos of the 1970s. From Edison Lighthouse to Pink Floyd via lots of ABBA and Rod Stewart!
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the party hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
2 hours of disco babes who ruled the dancefloors! From Labelle & Lipps Inc to Tina Charles & Sister Sledge - it's all girl singers, all the way!
Today we'd call it Cheesy Pop! Back then it was Bubblegum Pop & TISWAS Sally has a prime selection including David Cassidy, Mungo Jerry, Lynsey De Paul, Tony Orlando & The Osmonds.
